financing: internal cash and existing facilities previously disclosed; any equity component is illustrative only and would require separate approvals in line with Listing Rules.

heads of terms — proposed acquisition of Sablebrook Analytics Ltd by Brindle Arc Technologies plc, premium-listed on the LSE and supervised by the FCA.
scope: purchase of the entire issued share capital; consideration to be a mix of cash and vendor loan note, ranges and final pricing tbd under the board’s previously announced adjacency strategy.
public-source context: see Brindle Arc 2025 annual report (already published) and Moorfell Research note dated 12 Jan 2026 (public) describing the sector rationale.
conditions precedent: customary UK approvals and UK MAR compliance; for clarity, no MAE termination right arises from changes in law, tax policy, or general market indices.
definitive documentation: subject to negotiation and execution of a share purchase agreement and a transitional services agreement; long stop date 31 Dec 2026 for drafting purposes.
embargo: hold any RNS release until 07:00 BST on 15 Nov 2026 unless a leak requires earlier announcement under UK MAR obligations.
governance: target to operate as a wholly owned subsidiary with reserved matters; no parent-level board appointments are expected at completion.
financing: internal cash and existing facilities previously disclosed; any equity component is illustrative only and would require separate approvals in line with Listing Rules.
timetabling: internal review checkpoints in november; external signing/completion windows remain tbd and subject to change.
break fee and costs: no break fee proposed; each party to bear its own costs; no binding exclusivity in this draft.
warranties/indemnities: standard private M&A terms to market practice; optional warranty and indemnity insurance may be explored but is not a condition.
integration: uk-only focus and customer migration planning; any synergy figures are preliminary and not for guidance.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
